Retractable Banner Stand Hardware Specifications & Setup Features

The Retractor Lite 47 Hardware provides a professional foundation for your trade show and event banner displays. This lightweight aluminum banner stand system is designed for frequent setup and takedown, making it ideal for exhibitors who need reliable, portable display hardware.

Hardware Specifications

  • Lightweight aluminum base construction for durability and portability
  • Available in black or silver finish options
  • Two swivel feet provide enhanced stability on various floor surfaces
  • Shock cord pole system enables quick and easy assembly
  • Banner attaches with snap rail on top and banner tape on bottom
  • Product dimensions: 48" W x 83" H x 15" D
  • Product weight: 10.25 lbs for easy transport

Display Setup Features

The shock cord pole mechanism allows for effortless setup and breakdown, while the dual swivel feet ensure your display remains stable throughout your event. The snap rail and banner tape attachment system provides secure banner mounting for professional presentations.

Note: Banner graphics are sold separately. This listing includes hardware only.

Banner Graphics Requirements for Retractor Lite 47 Hardware

To ensure your banner graphics work perfectly with the Retractor Lite 47 Hardware, follow these specifications for optimal display quality and proper fitting.

Banner Dimensions

  • Recommended banner size: 47" width x 83" height
  • Snap rail accommodation at top edge of banner
  • Banner tape attachment area at bottom edge
  • Allow 1" margin on all sides for secure attachment

Graphics File Specifications

  • High-resolution files (300 DPI minimum) for sharp print quality
  • CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction
  • Vector graphics preferred for text and logo elements
  • PDF, AI, or EPS file formats recommended for printing

Design Considerations

  • Keep critical text and images away from attachment areas
  • Consider viewing distance when selecting font sizes
  • High contrast colors improve visibility in trade show lighting
  • Simple, bold designs work best for banner stand displays

Banner Material Compatibility

  • Vinyl banners work well with snap rail and tape system
  • Fabric banners provide premium appearance for upscale events
  • Mesh banners suitable for outdoor or high-airflow environments
  • Consult with graphics provider for material recommendations

Note: Banner graphics are ordered separately. This hardware is compatible with banners from most professional print providers.

Frequently Asked Questions - Banner Stand Hardware

What banner size works with the Retractor Lite 47 Hardware?

The hardware accommodates banners sized 47" width x 83" height. Your banner should include snap rail accommodation at the top and banner tape attachment area at the bottom for proper mounting.

Does the hardware include banner graphics?

No, this listing includes only the banner stand hardware. Banner graphics are sold separately and can be ordered from most professional print providers using the specifications provided in our artwork guidelines.

How much does the assembled banner stand weigh?

The complete hardware weighs 10.25 lbs, making it easy to transport between trade shows and events. The lightweight aluminum construction provides durability without excessive weight.

What's included with the banner stand hardware?

Your order includes the aluminum base, shock cord pole system, swivel feet, snap rail mechanism, and banner tape attachment hardware. No additional components are needed for basic assembly and banner mounting.

How long does setup take?

The shock cord pole system allows for quick assembly in just a few minutes without requiring any tools. The swivel feet adjust easily for stable positioning on various floor surfaces.

Can I choose between black and silver finishes?

Yes, the Retractor Lite 47 Hardware is available in both professional black and classic silver finishes to complement your branding and display preferences.

Is this suitable for outdoor events?

While the aluminum construction is durable, this banner stand is primarily designed for indoor trade shows and events. For outdoor use, consider additional anchoring for wind stability.

What are the assembled dimensions?

When fully assembled, the banner stand measures 48" W x 83" H x 15" D, providing excellent visibility while maintaining a compact footprint in your exhibit space.
